What sets the spa apart

A softer take on the neighborhood nail shop.

  • Lower-Odor Experience

    A fresher, calmer alternative to the typical strong nail-shop smell.

  • Detail-Focused Work

    Every shape, polish line, and finish is handled with careful attention.

  • Spa-Forward Products

    A softer salon experience with natural-feeling touches where available.

  • Owner-Watched Quality

    The owner keeps a close eye on service quality so guests feel heard before they leave.

The menu

Considered services, fairly priced.

Choose from natural nail care, enhancements, pedicures, waxing, and thoughtful finishing touches.
